user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor/controls text to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: The controls text at the bottom of the screen is currently hidden when the game is paused (line in ui.js checks `if (gameState.gamePhase !== "PAUSED")`), but the user wants it to remain visible along with the HUD. There is no gray overlay or "PAUSED" message being shown (which is what the user wants), so those are already correct.

- Files affected: ui.js

- Changes needed: Remove the condition that hides the controls text when paused. The controls should always be visible regardless of game phase.
